summary: Iteration 16 testing: Progress Stats Page & Book Progress APIs. Backend 10/10 tests PASSED. Frontend progress page route added and verified working.
critical_code_review_comments: Progress page implemented correctly with stats card (streak, chapters read, total reads), recent activity section, and expandable books list
The progress route was missing from _layout.tsx - FIXED by adding <Stack.Screen name='progress' options={{ presentation: 'card' }} />
Navigation from profile stats to progress page works correctly via TouchableOpacity with onPress={() => router.push('/progress')}
Book expansion feature works - clicking a book shows 'Capitoli Letti:' with green chapter chips
Empty state displayed correctly when no reading progress exists
seed_data_creation: Used existing reading history (Giovanni ch1,3; Genesi; Salmi; Matteo; Romani)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Progress page at /progress is now accessible. Stats show 2 streak, 6 chapters, 10 total reads. Books list is expandable to show chapters. Navigation from Profile stats to Progress works. The route was added to _layout.tsx.

api_progress_stats.details: GET /api/progress/stats returns basic_stats, total_unique_chapters, total_read_count, books_progress (top 10), recent_activity_count, chapters_read list

api_book_progress.details: GET /api/progress/book/{book_name} returns book name, chapters_read array, and details with read_count/last_read

stats_navigation.details: Clicking stats section in Profile navigates to /progress page

main_stats_display.details: Shows streak (fire icon), Capitoli Letti, Letture Totali with correct values

recent_activity.details: Shows 'X capitoli letti negli ultimi 7 giorni'

books_progress_list.details: Lists books with chapters count and reads count, expandable with arrow icon

book_expansion.details: Clicking book shows 'Capitoli Letti:' with green chapter chips (1, 3 for Giovanni)

achievement_section.details: 'Il Tuo Traguardo' shows 'Hai letto X capitoli unici da Y libri diversi'

empty_state.details: When no reading progress, shows 'Nessun progresso di lettura' with 'Inizia a Leggere' button

back_button.details: Arrow-back in header navigates back to previous screen
